scores.justification: v2 blocker repaired at the artifact: Theorem 5.3 (thm:horn-boundary) now cites horn_valuation_realizable_iff, which exists (proofs/TractatusOntologyHorn.lean:167-176, verified this pass), states exactly the printed per-valuation boundary, and depends on no axioms per #print axioms. The added global-form sentence correctly describes horn_realizable_iff. Method sound throughout; no artifact-unbacked theorem statement found.

64 declarations / 1,064 lines verified exactly this pass (37+9+6+12; wc -l 472+212+145+235); lake build re-run clean with the 9 documented #eval lines; 'six lines' proof-length claim now matches exclusion_not_horn's 6 tactic lines. Every headline claim has its kernel-checked witness.

Contributions enumerated (C1)-(C5), one extractable sentence each; central separation result crisp in abstract and intro; (C4) now accurately advertises both the per-valuation and global boundary forms.

Button, Moss, Armstrong/Skyrms, Evans-Berger, McKinsey/Horn, Benzmueller engaged on actual merits; v2 gap closed — Lokhorst and Weiss positioned as closest precedents in §7.5, Spinney 2022 engaged in the §4 footnote. 17/17 bib entries cited; no known close prior work missing. No litsearch sibling (legacy baseline, no deduction).

Resolvable URL now printed in §1, Appendix A, and the bib note, with toolchain pin (Lean 4.26) and per-theorem index. Residual weakness: no commit hash / tagged release / archival DOI, and the newly cited horn_valuation_realizable_iff exists only on the unpushed feature/issue-5 branch at review time — the public URL does not yet serve the cited declaration (must merge before submission).

Caption now reads 'not refinement-equivalent', matching Theorem 6.5 and the artwork's own 'no refinement equivalence' label (figure rendered and inspected: legible, black-only, print-safe). Appendix booktabs index clean with the widest row split across two lines.
scores.evidence_span: main.tex Figure 1 caption; figures/spectrum.pdf; Appendix A

scores.justification: Flow intact, prose disciplined; LaTeX hygiene verified by independent from-scratch compile: 0 overfull hboxes (any threshold), 0 errors, 0 undefined refs/cites, 10 pages. Draft marker dropped from \date.

scores.justification: 17/17 keys resolve with complete fields (cited set == bib set; bibtex 0 errors/warnings); Hacker claim now indirect quotation without invented locator; TLP 3.42 paraphrased outside quotation marks; evans2014 proper @misc with eprint/archivePrefix; proper-noun case protection added.
Ten pages, every section load-bearing, hedging proportional (Limitations concedes binary clauses, fixed atomization); contribution extractable from abstract + (C1)-(C5) in under 90 seconds.

findings.evidence_span: main.tex §1 (artifact paragraph), Appendix A; proofs/TractatusOntologyHorn.lean on feature/issue-5
findings.rationale: The printed repository URL resolves, but horn_valuation_realizable_iff — the Lean anchor of Theorem 5.3 — exists only on the unpushed feature/issue-5 branch at review time; a referee following the URL today finds a Horn module without the cited theorem. No commit hash / tag / DOI pins the reviewed state.
findings.suggested_fix: Verify the merge lands the lemma on the public default branch before submission; add a commit hash, tagged release, or Zenodo-style DOI to the artifact paragraph and Appendix A.

findings.rationale: Thread-root BRIEF.md still says '63 declarations'; the paper correctly says 64. BRIEF is reviser input, not part of the reviewable document, so no flag and no deduction — but the drift will mislead a future pass that trusts the BRIEF's evidence inventory.
findings.suggested_fix: Update the BRIEF's Experiments section to 64 declarations / 1,064 lines when the thread is next touched.

findings.rationale: 'no Horn model shares a nontrivial exclusion model's image profiles' can be misread as 'shares any profile' (false — e.g. the all-false profile is common); the theorem is inequality of profile sets.
findings.suggested_fix: Consider 'no Horn model realizes exactly the image profiles of a nontrivial exclusion model'.

findings.rationale: Procedural: render gate skipped fail-open (no PDF/compile-log for v3; pub-audit not yet run); reviewer compensated with an independent from-scratch compile (clean). Numeric-consistency and evidence-check automated passes both ran (no manual fallback).
findings.suggested_fix: Run pub-audit on v3 to produce the canonical PDF + compile log.
